text:
Win or go home.

No draws, no second chances, no “we’ll do better next game.”

This is where the World Cup gets exciting for fans.

And where it gets even more exciting for traders.

Here are the 16 Round of 32 matches for you to trade:

One match can change everything.

Trade the Game on PRED

Tonight isn’t about the favorites.
It’s about survival.

🇭🇷 Croatia need a result.
🇬🇭 Ghana are one game away from a famous qualification.
🇺🇿 Uzbekistan are chasing history.
🇩🇿 Algeria and Austria 🇦🇹 are playing a winner-takes-all match.
🇵🇹 Portugal vs Colombia 🇨🇴 could decide one of the tournament’s most competitive groups.

Six games. Six different stories.

The tournament has started to feel different.

Trade the Game on PRED.

Spain couldn’t score against them.
Uruguay couldn’t beat them.
Saudi Arabia couldn’t break them.

Cabo Verde arrived at their first-ever FIFA World Cup.

They leave the group stage unbeaten.

Spain: 0-0.
Uruguay: 2-2.
Saudi Arabia: 0-0.

Now they face Argentina in the knockout stage.

This is exactly why the World Cup belongs to everyone 🇨🇻

It's been a @dembouz vs Norway so far. 

Hat-trick in the first 32 minutes for him. 

Will Norway take control in the second half?

For everyone waiting for Mbappé vs Haaland, the wait might be a little longer.

Haaland starts on the bench.

The real question now:
When does he get called?

The market doesn’t wait for the final whistle. Trade the Game as it unfolds on PRED. https://t.co/iBAs3B97Ff

The World Cup gives us Haaland vs Mbappé tonight. 

⚡ Erling Haaland: 4 goals in 2 games for Norway.
⚡ Kylian Mbappé: 4 goals in 2 games for France.

France haven't conceded a goal.
Norway have scored 7 in 2 matches.

Both teams are unbeaten.
Only one finishes top of Group I.

The market says:
🇳🇴 Norway 20.4¢
🇫🇷 France 59.5¢

Is Norway being underestimated, or is Mbappé simply inevitable?

What's your trade?

Germany scored 9 goals in 2 games.
7-1 and 2-1. The pattern is obvious.

Ecuador haven't kept a clean sheet all tournament.

How many does Germany score tonight? 
Trade the Game on PRED. https://t.co/Gd7iSfIjSF
https://t.co/XRCLVhWUTP

.@neymarjr is pure aura.

The entire stadium erupted the moment he stepped onto the pitch. Every phone was in the air. Every touch got a reaction.

Will Neymar get a longer appearance next game and find the net? https://t.co/g6sudo5IHZ

The World Cup starts to get serious today.

Group winners, qualification spots, and knockout dreams are all on the line.

🇲🇽 Mexico have already secured top spot in Group A, but the battle for the remaining places is wide open.

In Group B, 🇨🇦 Canada and 🇨🇭 Switzerland meet with first place at stake, while 🇧🇦 Bosnia and 🇶🇦 Qatar fight to stay alive.

Then comes the headline fixture.

🇧🇷 Brazil take on 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 Scotland, with Neymar back in the squad and McGinn and McTominay looking to cause problems in midfield.

And if Brazil slip up, 🇲🇦 Morocco have the chance to capitalize against 🇭🇹 Haiti.

Every point matters now.
Every goal changes something.

Trade the Game PRED.

4 fixtures today, a packed slate. 

Expect goals, chaos, and maybe a few new legends in the making.

More importantly, there are plenty of markets live for you to trade.
